flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clatsop Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $5.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Clatsop Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.0k → $9.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Clatsop Community College rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $11.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clatsop Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
